Title: SCPatcher: Automated Smart Contract Code Repair via Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Knowledge Graph
Abstract: Smart contract vulnerabilities can cause substantial financial losses due to the immutability of code after deployment. While existing tools detect vulnerabilities, they cannot effectively repair them. In this paper, we propose SCPatcher, a framework that combines retrieval-augmented generation with a knowledge graph for automated smart contract repair. We construct a knowledge graph from 5,000 verified Ethereum contracts, extracting function-level relationships to build a semantic network. This
